codeReview.summary: Most targeted silent-error sites were updated correctly, but one API regression was introduced in triggerDeploy request parsing.

issues.description: triggerDeploy now treats any Decode error as malformed JSON. For an empty request body, json.Decoder.Decode returns io.EOF, so the handler returns HTTP 400 and never reaches the existing default-to-main fallback (line 744). This changes prior behavior and can break clients that POST with no body; EOF should be treated as an empty payload, while truly malformed JSON should return 400.

summary: Review failed due to a blocking API behavior regression: triggerDeploy now rejects empty request bodies with 400 instead of allowing default commit resolution to main.
